name: Chinese Chicken-Noodle Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 Cup (1/2-inch) diagonally sliced fresh snow peas
2 Cups shredded cooked chicken breast, approximately 3/4#
1 medium cucumber, peeled, halved lengthwise, and sliced – about 3/4 cup
recipeInstructions:
1. Break pasta into 5-inch pieces.
2. Cook in boiling water for 2 minutes.
3. Add snow peas and cook an additional minute.
4. Drain and rinse under cold, running water; drain well.
5. Combine the pasta mixture, chicken, and next three ingredients in a bowl; set aside.
6. In another bowl, combine teriyaki sauce and next five ingredients; stir well.
7. Pour over the pasta mixture and toss well.
8. Serve at room temperature or chilled.
Yield: 4 servings of 1-1/2 cups each.
